questions.q: If a pod fails to start with the status 'CreateContainerConfigError', which of the following is the most likely cause?
options: The container image registry requires authentication credentials that were not provided
The pod references a missing ConfigMap or Secret in its environment/volume definitions
The node has exceeded its CPU or memory capacity
The pod's liveness probe has failed three times consecutively
questions.explanation: CreateContainerConfigError is thrown when the kubelet attempts to build the container's configuration but fails because a referenced ConfigMap or Secret is missing from the namespace.
